steps.title: Identify the distribution scenario
steps.content: The passage contrasts giving the award to one person versus multiple people, then asks how it's given when there are “two or three individuals.” The example—”among those awarded”—confirms multiple recipients receiving simultaneously.

steps.title: Match the word for shared awards
steps.content: ”Jointly” means recipients share the award together, fitting how awards are distributed to multiple people at once. The other three address ceremony manner, timing, and emotional tone rather than distribution itself. This matches choice B — B is correct.
